calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville, CSR 703.
Petitioners Jianhong Huang and Nianbi Chen; father and mother of minor present in court.
Petitioner Jianhong sworn and examined; Mother Nianbi Chen sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Nancy Hing Wong, (counsel for petitioners).
Proof of Publication on file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name of minor from Yuxan Huang to Samuel Huang.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.
